# standalone

The goal of standalone is to provide standalone scripts that are useful
for the development of R packages. The standalone package **will not**
be a dependency of the package you are developing. You don’t even need
to install it to use the standalone scripts housed in this repo.

## Example

To copy a standalone script with useful checks against user inputs, run:

``` r

usethis::use_standalone("insightsengineering/standalone", file = "checks")
```

# Package index

## All functions

- [`lst_scripts`](https://insightsengineering.github.io/standalone/reference/lst_scripts.md)
  : Standalone Script
